summary: Added balance gating to VAPI webhook. On assistant-request: extracts caller phone, checks caller_balances (free 15 min + purchased), gates if 0 remaining. Returning purchasers get personalized firstMessage. On end-of-call-report: deducts actual minutes (free tier first). Added normalizePhone, runDbQuery, checkCallerBalance, deductCallMinutes. Compiles clean.
broadcast: Balance gating wired. assistant-request gates on balance. end-of-call-report deducts. Free tier 15 min. E.164 normalization.
